TechCrunch.title: Telehealth giant Hims & Hers says its customer support system was hacked
TechCrunch.summary: The U.S. telehealth giant says hackers stole customer support ticket data over the course of several days in February.

TechCrunch.title: Artemis II is NASA’s last moon mission without Silicon Valley

TechCrunch.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN, the buzzy founder-led business talk show

TechCrunch.title: Flipboard’s new ‘social websites’ help publishers and creators tap into the open social web

TechCrunch.title: ElevenLabs releases a new AI-powered music-generation app
TechCrunch.summary: ElevenMusic lets users create and remix songs using text prompts. The new app suggests ElevenLabs wants to be more than just a voice model company.

TechCrunch.title: NASA astronauts prove that sending an email really is rocket science

TechCrunch.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models

TechCrunch.summary: An exposed Amazon-hosted server allowed anyone to access reams of customer data without needing a password.
